turbidity.definition: The cloudiness or haziness of a liquid caused by particles

nitrile.definition: A type of synthetic rubber used to make protective gloves

pH.definition: A scale from 0-14 measuring how acidic or basic a substance is; 7 is neutral

contamination.definition: The presence of harmful substances in the environment
